name: CDC
description: The US Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) provides a suite of public APIs for accessing disease surveillance data, vaccination rates, health statistics, environmental public health tracking, and public health datasets.

provider.name: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention

itemListElement.name: CDC Open Data API
itemListElement.description: Repository of all available CDC datasets accessible via the Socrata Open Data API (SODA).

itemListElement.name: CDC WONDER API
itemListElement.description: The CDC WONDER (Wide-ranging Online Data for Epidemiologic Research) API enables automated data queries in XML format over HTTP.

itemListElement.name: CDC Environmental Public Health Tracking Network API
itemListElement.description: Allows querying of data from the CDC National Environmental Public Health Tracking Network.

itemListElement.name: CDC Content Syndication API
itemListElement.description: Enables CDC to offer web content to other sites and applications.

itemListElement.name: PHIN VADS API
itemListElement.description: The Public Health Information Network Vocabulary Access and Distribution System (PHIN VADS) REST API for accessing public health vocabularies.

itemListElement.name: DIBBs eCR Refiner API
itemListElement.description: CDC DIBBS electronic Case Reporting (eCR) refinement API for managing disease reporting configurations.

itemListElement.name: DIBBs Query Connector API
itemListElement.description: CDC DIBBS API for executing healthcare data queries against FHIR servers using patient identifiers.
